description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a partially constructed or exposed hip roof, revealing the wooden truss structure beneath. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, and the windows are large and symmetrically arranged, providing ample natural light. The house sits on a paved foundation surrounded by a stone or gravel yard, with a clear walkway encircling the building. The roof features two visible chimneys, and the main entryway is located on the side with a single door and no porch or overhang. The overall design is boxy and modern, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements. The window arrangement and roof structure suggest a practical, contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern two-story house with a partially exposed hip roof, light-colored walls, and large symmetrical windows, set on a paved foundation with a stone yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with three large windows on the ground floor, two on the upper floor, and the exposed roof trusses.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, two stories of windows, and the continuation of the exposed roof structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall, a single window on each floor, and the hip roof structure visible above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a secondary entrance door, two upper windows, and the paved walkway around the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with no porch or overhang, flush with the wall and accessed via a paved walkway.
